backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that handles contact form submissions with CRUD operations (submit, get all, filter by project type/email, delete) and includes blob storage mixin for asset management.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting four high-confidence features related to debugging and fixing the Portfolio component's 60 gallery image loading issues across residential, commercial, and before-after categories.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of frontend files including styling, components, hooks, and configuration, highlighting scroll animations, typography enhancements, and the Portfolio component's image loading implementation.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining light and dark theme variables for background, foreground, primary, secondary, muted, accent, destructive, border, and sidebar colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point that loads the React application into a root div and imports the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application component that composes the single-page website with Navigation, Hero, Services, Portfolio, About, Contact, and Footer sections.
frontend/src/components/About.tsx: About section with asymmetric 60/40 layout featuring company description, design philosophy, and four value cards (Passion, Excellence, Collaboration, Innovation) with scroll animations.
frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx: Contact form component with validation, toast notifications, project type selection, and contact information display that submits data via useSubmitContact mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component with brand logo, quick navigation links, social media icons (Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn), copyright notice, and Caffeine.ai attribution with UTM tracking.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Hero section component with background image, logo, title, tagline, and two CTA buttons that scroll to portfolio and contact sections.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed navigation bar with logo, desktop menu links, and mobile sheet menu that tracks active section on scroll and provides smooth scrolling to sections.
frontend/src/components/Portfolio.tsx: Portfolio gallery component with category filtering (residential, commercial, before-after) displaying 9 project cards with images, titles, and descriptions.
frontend/src/components/Services.tsx: Services section displaying 6 interior design service cards with icons, titles, and descriptions in a responsive grid layout.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages an ICP backend actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state and identity persistence using AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query mutation hook for submitting contact form data to the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useScrollAnimation.ts: Custom hook using IntersectionObserver to trigger animations when elements scroll into viewport, with reduced motion support.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file with Tailwind directives, custom CSS variables for a warm luxury interior design color palette (light and dark modes), base typography styles, and scroll animation utilities.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient provider for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color system using OKLCH color space, extended font families (Inter, Playfair Display, Cormorant Garamond), custom spacing, shadows, and animation keyframes for an elegant design system.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking Casa Di Vida interior design website features, architectural notes, and a known issue where gallery images are not displaying (showing dark blank spaces in residential, commercial, and before/after sections).
